examples: From see you one eye, I dreck love you.
Dreck: Oh come on! Our ancestors survived winters like these without any heating.
For the foreseeable future, we will all continue to hate the industrial-scale dreck that dominates our diets, but will continue to eat it nevertheless.
Some of what is being produced now will become that and 99% (as Theodore Sturgeon pointed out) will be forgotten as the dreck that it is.
If what is posted here is the level of quality one can expect from Forbes, Forbes can expect that I no longer have any need to read their dreck.
